description: Style NoteEvery girl needs a choice of kurtas in her off-duty wardrobe. vishudh considers the street fads that are trending currently and adds it to their latest collection of kurtas. This stylish piece remains ethnic in its cut and silhouette but references contemporary design details to create unique fusion wear. For the conservative at heart, this piece can be worn with leggings and delicate sandals. Product DetailsMulti coloured printed kurta with a mandarin collar and a split neckline, has short sleeves and ethnic print above the vented hem Material and CareBlended cottonMachine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachDry inside out in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorations Size and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
